attempts.strategy: Verbatim probe-confirmed body from PROGRESS.md template — term-mode invocation of Mathlib's IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen with explicit @-algebra binding in the conclusion type, threading iter-058 inclusion + iter-057 equality as the morphism / equality arguments.
attempts.code_tried:
theorem basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_isLocalization
    {k : Type u} [Field k] {C : Over (Spec (.of k))}
    {U : TopologicalSpace.Opens C.left.toTopCat} (hU : IsAffineOpen U)
    (s : Set Γ(C.left, U)) (t : Finset s) (h : t.Nonempty) :
    @IsLocalization.Away _ _ (∏ i ∈ t, (i.1 : Γ(C.left, U)))
      Γ(C.left, t.inf' h (basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) s)) _
      ((C.left.presheaf.map (homOfLE
        (basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_le (C := C) (U := U) s t h)).op).hom.toAlgebra) :=
  hU.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen _
    (homOfLE (basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_le (C := C) (U := U) s t h))
    (basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_eq_basicOpen_prod (C := C) (U := U) s t h)
attempts.goal_before: @IsLocalization.Away _ _ (∏ i ∈ t, (i.1 : Γ(C.left, U))) Γ(C.left, t.inf' h (basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) s)) _ ((C.left.presheaf.map (homOfLE (basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_le (C := C) (U := U) s t h)).op).hom.toAlgebra)
attempts.insight: Explicit @-algebra binding in the conclusion type is mandatory. Mathlib's default `algebra_section_section_basicOpen` instance only fires for the syntactic form `Γ(X, X.basicOpen f)`, not for arbitrary V definitionally equal to it; the @-form threads the user-supplied algebra structure ((C.left.presheaf.map i.op).hom.toAlgebra) and sidesteps synthesis. Three-arg form `hU.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen _ <morphism> <equality>` is the canonical call shape — the underscore is f, inferred from the conclusion `IsLocalization.Away f`. lean_verify confirms kernel-only axioms [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound].

next_steps: Iter-060+ moves to the substantive basic-open Koszul acyclicity branch via the extra-degeneracy engine (Mathlib.AlgebraicTopology.ExtraDegeneracy.homotopyEquiv + Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Limits.FormalCoproducts.ExtraDegeneracy.extraDegeneracyCech) and `exact_of_localized_span` / `exact_of_isLocalized_span` (both exist in Mathlib.RingTheory.LocalProperties.Exactness). Estimate ~2-3 iterations, ~150-250 LOC. The four scaffolding pieces (basicOpenCover, _finset_inf'_isAffineOpen, _finset_inf'_le, _finset_inf'_isLocalization) are now all in place; iter-060+ does not need any new foundational helpers.
